roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT BRIEF ON DEFRRD ENTRY OF JUDGMNT & PROB PERS RELN FORM FILED
/CAL:DEJ PROG RPT/DEF:WITHDRAWS NO CONTEST PLEA AND ENTERS NOT GUILTY PLEAAS TO COUNT 3/MO PC 1385:DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED DEFERRED ENTRYOF JUDGMENT/SATERM/

/CAL:TRIAL READINESS/X: THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO AMEND THE COMPLAINT TOADD COUNT 003, 240PC, A MISDEMEANOR, IS GRANTED,/FAWC/IRRC/  /VD:LAST DAYOF 01-09-19, TRIAL ON 12-24-18/15    GDIV ELIG RPT DEFER ENTRY/X:DEFEREDDRDENTRY OF JUDGMENT; DEFENDANT ENTS NOLO PLEA & REFERRED TO DIVERSION/DEFTADV NL:003/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/DEF:TO DO 20 ADDITONAL SESSIONSOF ANGER MANAGEMENT OR PARENTING CLASSES BY 06-03-19/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL TOPROVIDE PROOF/CONTD:DEJ PROGRESS REPORT/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/

/CAL: MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE/X: THIS PROCEEDING IS NOT REPORTED,/NP/CTORD: MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: THIS IS A GREEN GROUPCASE; THE GREEN GROUP WAS TO REMAIN IN DEPARTMENT 17 TODAY,/
